task_completion.description: Open FreeCAD and create a new document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is open with a new empty document, part, or body visible in the tree view.

task_completion.description: Create a 2D sketch of the dogbone profile
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD Sketcher workbench is active, showing a 2D outline of a tensile specimen (wider at the ends, narrower in the middle).

task_completion.description: Apply correct dimensions and symmetry to the sketch
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimensional constraints are visible in the sketch: 115 (length), 19 (end width), 6 (center width), 33 (straight section), and 14 (radius). The sketch should be centered on the origin indicating X and Y symmetry.

task_completion.description: Extrude the sketch into a 3D solid with 4mm thickness
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D solid dogbone model is visible in the 3D view. The Pad/Extrude dialog or property panel should show a length/thickness of 4 mm.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the directory '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' and the filename 'tensile_specimen.FCStd', or the FreeCAD window title bar/tree view shows 'tensile_specimen' as the active saved document.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and workbenches (like Sketcher and Part Design) rather than just executing a terminal script.

integrity.description: Model was created from scratch, not imported
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD combo view (Tree view) shows a history of creation, such as a 'Body' containing a 'Sketch' and a 'Pad', rather than an imported mesh or step file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeCAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD interface is clearly visible and actively used, not mocked or bypassed via text editors.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an ASTM D638 Type IV tensile specimen in FreeCAD. Look for these specific dimensional constraints in the sketcher: Overall length = 115 mm, End width = 19 mm, Center (gauge) width = 6 mm, Straight section length = 33 mm, Transition radius = 14 mm. The extrusion (pad) thickness must be 4 mm. The final file must be saved exactly as 'tensile_specimen.FCStd' in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.
